column.name: etechflow_delivery_date
column.comment: Customer-picked delivery date (YYYY-MM-DD). Persisted from quote to order.

column.name: etechflow_delivery_time_interval_id
column.comment: FK to etechflow_dd_time_interval.interval_id. NULL when time slot not used.

column.name: etechflow_delivery_comment
column.comment: Free-text delivery notes from the customer. Capped via admin config.

column.name: etechflow_delivery_date
column.comment: Customer-picked delivery date (YYYY-MM-DD). Copied from quote_address at order placement.

column.name: etechflow_delivery_time_interval_id
column.comment: FK to etechflow_dd_time_interval.interval_id. NULL when time slot not used.

column.name: etechflow_delivery_comment
column.comment: Free-text delivery notes from the customer.

column.name: interval_id
column.comment: Internal slot ID

column.name: store_id
column.comment: Store-view scope (0 = all stores)

column.name: from_time
column.comment: Slot start (HH:MM, 24h)

column.name: to_time
column.comment: Slot end (HH:MM, 24h)

column.name: position
column.comment: Sort order in the customer-facing dropdown

table.name: etechflow_dd_exception_day
table.comment: Single-day exceptions to the regular delivery schedule (holidays, one-off working days)

column.name: exception_id
column.comment: Internal exception ID

column.name: store_ids
column.comment: Comma-separated store IDs the exception applies to. 0 = all stores. (Matches Amasty's pattern.)

column.name: day_type
column.comment: 'holiday' = block delivery / 'working' = force-enable delivery on a day that would normally be blocked

column.name: day
column.comment: Day of month, 1-31

column.name: month
column.comment: Month, 1-12

column.name: year
column.comment: Year (4 digits), or NULL when the exception recurs every year

column.name: description
column.comment: Merchant-visible label (e.g. 'Christmas Day', 'Boxing Day open for delivery')

table.name: etechflow_dd_exception_interval
table.comment: Date-range exceptions to the regular delivery schedule (vacations, holiday weeks, blocks)

column.name: interval_id
column.comment: Internal interval ID

column.name: store_ids
column.comment: Comma-separated store IDs. 0 = all stores.

column.name: each_year
column.comment: When TRUE, the year fields are ignored — interval recurs annually

column.name: each_month
column.comment: When TRUE, the month fields are ignored — interval recurs monthly

column.name: from_day
column.comment: Range start: day of month, 1-31

column.name: from_month
column.comment: Range start: month, 1-12

column.name: from_year
column.comment: Range start: year. NULL when each_year=true.

column.name: to_day
column.comment: Range end: day of month, 1-31

column.name: to_month
column.comment: Range end: month, 1-12

column.name: to_year
column.comment: Range end: year. NULL when each_year=true.

column.name: description
column.comment: Merchant-visible label (e.g. 'Spring break', 'Warehouse stocktake')

table.name: etechflow_dd_quota_used
table.comment: Per-store-per-day delivery quota tracker. Incremented on order place, decremented on order cancel.

column.name: delivery_date
column.comment: The day customers picked for delivery (YYYY-MM-DD)

column.name: used_count
column.comment: Number of orders currently scheduled for this delivery date
